Class LatencyRecord

java.lang.Object
io.perl.api.LatencyRecord
Direct Known Subclasses:
LatencyRecorder
public abstract sealed class LatencyRecord extends Object permits LatencyRecorder
Base class that holds aggregated latency and count statistics for a measurement window or total aggregation. It provides common fields and a reset() method to initialize or clear the counters.

Fields include totalRecords, totalBytes, valid/invalid/discard counters, min/max latency and aggregated total latency used to compute averages.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected long
    higherLatencyDiscardRecords
    Number of latency samples discarded because they exceeded the maximum threshold.
    protected long
    invalidLatencyRecords
    Number of invalid/negative latency samples observed.
    protected long
    lowerLatencyDiscardRecords
    Number of latency samples discarded because they were below the minimum threshold.
    protected long
    maxLatency
    Maximum observed latency.
    protected long
    minLatency
    Minimum observed latency; starts at Long.MAX_VALUE until samples are recorded.
    protected long
    totalBytes
    Cumulative bytes observed during the aggregation period.
    protected long
    totalLatency
    Sum of latencies of valid samples; used to compute averages.
    protected long
    totalRecords
    Total number of records observed.
    protected long
    validLatencyRecords
    Number of records counted as valid latency samples.

  • Field Details

    • totalRecords

      protected long totalRecords
      Total number of records observed.

    • validLatencyRecords

      protected long validLatencyRecords
      Number of records counted as valid latency samples.

    • lowerLatencyDiscardRecords

      protected long lowerLatencyDiscardRecords
      Number of latency samples discarded because they were below the minimum threshold.

    • higherLatencyDiscardRecords

      protected long higherLatencyDiscardRecords
      Number of latency samples discarded because they exceeded the maximum threshold.

    • invalidLatencyRecords

      protected long invalidLatencyRecords
      Number of invalid/negative latency samples observed.

    • totalBytes

      protected long totalBytes
      Cumulative bytes observed during the aggregation period.

    • totalLatency

      protected long totalLatency
      Sum of latencies of valid samples; used to compute averages.

    • minLatency

      protected long minLatency
      Minimum observed latency; starts at Long.MAX_VALUE until samples are recorded.

    • maxLatency

      protected long maxLatency
      Maximum observed latency.
